nameMeanings.name: Svensson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Anders, Erik, Lennart, Sven, Ejnar, Johan, Bent, Bjorn, Gunn, Holger, Mats.  German Ernst, Kurt, Markus, Otto.

Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Sven, from Old Norse Sveinn, originally a byname meaning ‘boy, servant’. It is also found in Denmark, northern Germany, and Norway. Compare Svenson , Swainson , Swanson , Swenson , Swensson , and Swinson .

variants.name: Swanson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nils, Nels, Sven, Lars, Thor, Helmer, Iver, Alf, Astrid, Eskil, Hilmer.
Americanized form of Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, and North German   Svensson  , and Norwegian and Danish   Svensen   or   Svendsen  , cognates of 1.

Scottish (Caithness) and English: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Swan, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Sveinn (from sveinn ‘lad’), + -son. In northern England, Middle English Swanson was in fact an occasional variant of Swainson . In some cases the name may also arise from Middle English swan(e), swon(e) ‘swineherd, peasant, male servant’ (Old English swān) + -son, but this is unlikely to be the usual origin. See Swan .

variants.name: Svenson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Sven, Erik, Bjorn, Dagny.  German Kurt, Gerhard, Irmgard.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Svensson  . This surname is also found in Denmark, northern Germany, and Norway.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Svensen   or   Svendsen  , cognates of 1.

variants.name: Swensson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik.  German Kurt, Gerda.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Svensson  . This surname is also found in Denmark, northern Germany, and Norway, but it is rare there.

variants.name: Swinson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish, Norwegian, and Danish   Svensson  , and Norwegian and Danish   Svensen  .
English: perhaps a variant of   Swainson  .

variants.name: Swenson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Swen, Nels, Selmer, Britt, Helmer, Lars, Eskil, Lennart, Nils, Ordell, Sten.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Svensson   or of its rare variant   Swensson  . This surname is also found in Denmark, northern Germany, and Norway, but it is rare there.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Svensen   and   Svendsen  , cognates of 1.

nameMeanings.name: Brun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Germanic word brun ‘brown’. This was in use as a name in many of the ruling families of Germany during the Middle Ages. It was borne by a 10th-century saint, son of the Emperor Henry the Fowler, and by the Saxon duke who gave his name to Brunswick (German Braunschweig, i.e. ‘Bruno's settlement’). Its use in the English-speaking world, which dates from the end of the 19th century, may have been partly influenced by Lewis Carroll's Sylvie and Bruno ( 1889 ), but more probably it was first used by settlers of German ancestry in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: Brun Svensson was born in 1422 as the son of Väpnare Sven Brynjulfsson. He had at least 13 sons and 11 daughters with Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. He died after 1495.

fr.lifeSummary: Brun Svensson est né en 1422, fils de Väpnare Sven Brynjulfsson. Il a eu au moins 13 fils et 11 filles avec Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Il est décédé après 1495.

de.lifeSummary: Brun Svensson wurde 1422, als Sohn von Väpnare Sven Brynjulfsson geboren. Er hatte mit Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting mindestens 13 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Er starb nach 1495.

it.lifeSummary: Brun Svensson è nato il nel 1422 come figlio di Väpnare Sven Brynjulfsson. Lui avuto almeno 13 figli e 11 figlie con Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Morì dopo il 1495.

ja.lifeSummary: Brun Svenssonは1422年にVäpnare Sven Brynjulfssonの息子として生まれた。彼はGyrit Bengtsdotter Rytingとの間に少なくとも13人の息子と11人の娘をもうけた。彼は1495年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Brun Svensson(은)는 1422년 Väpnare Sven Brynjulfsson의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1495년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Brun Svensson nasceu em 1422 filho de Väpnare Sven Brynjulfsson. Ele teve pelo menos 13 filhos e 11 filhas com Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Ele faleceu após 1495.

ru.lifeSummary: Brun Svensson родился в 1422 г. Его отца звали Väpnare Sven Brynjulfsson. У него было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 11 дочерей от Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Он умер после 1495 г.

es.lifeSummary: Brun Svensson nació en 1422 como hijo de Väpnare Sven Brynjulfsson. Tuvo por lo menos 13 hijos y 11 hijas con Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Murió después de 1495.
